                       +------------------+
                       |    Data Sources  |
                       |                  |
                       |  +------------+  |
                       | ++  Source 1  |  |
                       | ++------------+  |
                       | |                |
+--------------+       | ++------------+  |
|  Aggregator  |<------o-++  Source 2  |  |
+--------------+       | ++------------+  |
                       | |                |
                       | ++------------+  |
                       | ++  Source 3  |  |
                       |  +------------+  |
                       |                  |
                       |                  |
                       +------------------+
